CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Always show in portrait
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Always show the directional overlay in portrait mode

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Always show in landscape
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Always show the directional overlay in landscape mode

ListPreference.android:title: Portrait location
ListPreference.android:summary: The location of the overlay in portrait mode

ListPreference.android:title: Landscape location
ListPreference.android:summary: The location of the overlay in landscape mode

SeekBarPreference.android:dialogMessage: The opacity between invisible (0) and opaque (255)

SeekBarPreference.android:summary: The relative size of the overlay
SeekBarPreference.android:dialogMessage: Change the relative size of the overlay buttons

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Allow map input with overlay
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Allow directional input by clicking on the map when the overlay is shown
